description:
Advances: specled.spec_review.decisions_governance_inline

A decision file deleted in the change set (e.g. atlas.decision.reranker_replaces_score.md in atlas PR 62) is absent from the head index, so build_decisions_changed (review.ex:592) yields id: nil and html.ex renders the confusing minimal card 'decision changed but no parsed ADR available'. SpecDiff.adr_change_status/3 already returns :removed but only runs for head-index ADRs — the REMOVED chip path in render_changed_decision_full is dead code.

Fix: when a changed decision file is missing from the head index, fetch base content via git show <base>:<file>, parse it (DecisionParser), and render a REMOVED card with parsed title/status/affects and the former body folded. Fallback copy when even base parsing fails should say the file was deleted in this change.
title: Deleted decision files render as 'no parsed ADR available' instead of REMOVED with content
